GB/T 13786一2022
Artificial daylighting illumination for
cotton classing rooms
1 Scope
This document specifies the technical requirements of ilumination quality，lighting intensity，ilumi-
nation conditions，ilumination unit as well as installation mode，environmental color，maintenance
of iumination equipment，and other technical requirements of artificial daylighting for cotton class-
ing rooms.
This document is applicable to cotton classing rooms.
2 Normative references
The document has no normative references.
3 Terms and definitions
For the purposes of this document，the following terms and definitions apply.
3.1
spectral power distribution
the function between spectral intensity and wavelength
[source: GB/T 5698一2001, 3.3, modified]
3.2
CIE standard illuminates
a Specific relative spectral power distribution incident on an object specified by the International
Council on INIumination (CIE).
NOTE Standard iluminates Dxs (approximately 7 504 K correlated color temperature of daylight)
[source: GB/T 5698一2001, 4. 85, modified]

1
